flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Notre Dame de Namur University fell 88% between 2021 and 2024 (54.6% → 6.7%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Notre Dame de Namur University fell 84% between 2021 and 2024 (40.9% → 6.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 19 pp at Notre Dame de Namur University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (31.6% vs 51.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Notre Dame de Namur University rose 16% between 2007 and 2010 ($24.6k → $28.5k).
